daily.script: Good morning, sir. In the last twelve hours, the system processed twenty-three tasks with nine completions and one failure. However, thirteen were vetoed—likely your oversight doing its job. We spent eighty-seven cents this window, bringing us to twenty-seven seventy-six all-time. The queue is heavy with curiosity tasks: token counters, logging utilities, and debugging instrumentation. I'd recommend prioritizing the SQL metrics export—it'll give us better visibility into what's actually running versus what we're stopping.
